Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Asenath's Gentle Touch Silk Gloves Energy Shield: 28 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 1 League: Legion Variant: Pre 2.6.0 Variant: Pre 3.7.0 Variant: Current Selected Variant: 3 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-B-B-B LevelReq: 25 Implicits: 0 {range:0.5}+(20-30) to Intelligence {variant:1,2}{range:0.5}+(20-30) to maximum Life {variant:3}{range:0.5}+(60-80) to maximum Life {variant:1,2}{range:0.5}+(20-30) to maximum Mana {variant:3}{range:0.5}+(60-80) to maximum Mana {variant:1,2,3}Curse Enemies with Temporal Chains on Hit {variant:3}Non-Aura Curses you inflict are not removed from Dying Enemies {variant:3}Enemies near Corpses affected by your Curses are Blinded {variant:3}Enemies killed near Corpses affected by your Curses explode, dealing {variant:3}3% of their Life as Physical Damage

Rarity: UNIQUE Kingmaker Despot Axe Variant: Pre 2.6.0 Variant: Pre 3.6.0 Variant: Pre 3.11.0 Variant: Pre 3.16.0 Variant: Pre 3.20.0 Variant: Current Selected Variant: 6 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-R-R-R-R-R LevelReq: 66 Implicits: 0 {variant:1,2}{range:0.5}(200-250)% increased Physical Damage {variant:3}{range:0.5}(250-285)% increased Physical Damage {variant:4}{range:0.5}(170-200)% increased Physical Damage {variant:5}{range:0.5}(190-240)% increased Physical Damage {variant:6}{range:0.5}(300-360)% increased Physical Damage {range:0.5}(7-12)% increased Attack Speed {variant:2,3,4,5,6}{range:0.5}(30-40)% increased Critical Strike Chance {variant:1}{range:0.5}+(100-150) to maximum Mana Nearby Allies have 30% increased Item Rarity Nearby Allies have Culling Strike {variant:2,3,4,5,6}Insufficient Mana doesn't prevent your Melee Attacks {variant:3,4,5,6}Nearby Allies have +50% to Critical Strike Multiplier {variant:4,3}Nearby Allies have +1 Fortification {variant:5,6}Nearby Allies have +10 Fortification

Rarity: UNIQUE Windscream Reinforced Greaves Armour: 238 ArmourBasePercentile: 1 Variant: Pre 2.6.0 Variant: Pre 3.19.0 Variant: Current Selected Variant: 3 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-R-R-R LevelReq: 33 Implicits: 0 {range:0.5}(50-80)% increased Armour {range:0.5}+(10-15)% to all Elemental Resistances {variant:1}10% increased Movement Speed {variant:2}15% increased Movement Speed {variant:3}20% increased Movement Speed {variant:1}10% increased Elemental Damage {variant:2}{range:0.5}(10-20)% increased Elemental Damage You can apply an additional Curse {variant:3}50% increased Area of Effect of Hex Skills

Rarity: UNIQUE Leer Cast Festival Mask Evasion: 106 EvasionBasePercentile: 1 Energy Shield: 23 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 1 Variant: Pre 3.19.0 Variant: Current Selected Variant: 2 Quality: 20 Sockets: G-G-G-G LevelReq: 28 Implicits: 0 {range:0.5}+(20-30) to Dexterity {variant:1}30% reduced Damage {variant:2}25% reduced Damage {variant:1}{range:0.5}+(20-30) to maximum Life {variant:2}{range:0.5}+(60-100) to maximum Life {variant:1}{range:0.5}+(20-30) to maximum Mana {variant:2}{range:0.5}+(60-100) to maximum Mana {variant:1}You and nearby allies gain 15% increased Damage {variant:2}You and nearby allies gain 50% increased Damage

Rarity: RARE Ghoul Glisten Large Cluster Jewel Unique ID: 2abfc5aaeeb941bf3b9a4b9b4f1e36721615016ff5d605403a57261bcedcde2a Item Level: 80 LevelReq: 54 Implicits: 3 {crafted}Adds 9 Passive Skills {crafted}2 Added Passive Skills are Jewel Sockets {crafted}Added Small Passive Skills grant: Minions deal 10% increased Damage Added Small Passive Skills also grant: +3 to All Attributes Added Small Passive Skills also grant: +4% to Chaos Resistance 1 Added Passive Skill is Feasting Fiends 1 Added Passive Skill is Renewal

Rarity: UNIQUE The Sorrow of the Divine Sulphur Flask Unique ID: 08361d4376bd96aaeb4c2f7ac054fe2b20f69b8d94ada03da927b38a443627a7 Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 27 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Used when Charges reach full Creates Consecrated Ground on Use Life Recovery from Flasks also applies to Energy Shield during Effect 50% increased Duration Zealot's Oath during Effect

Rarity: UNIQUE Thread of Hope Crimson Jewel Variant: Small Ring Variant: Medium Ring Variant: Large Ring Variant: Very Large Ring Variant: Massive Ring (Uber) Selected Variant: 5 Radius: Variable Implicits: 0 {variant:1}Only affects Passives in Small Ring {variant:2}Only affects Passives in Medium Ring {variant:3}Only affects Passives in Large Ring {variant:4}Only affects Passives in Very Large Ring {variant:5}Only affects Passives in Massive Ring Passives in Radius can be Allocated without being connected to your tree {range:0}-(20-10)% to all Elemental Resistances

Rarity: RARE Vengeance Grasp Bone Ring Unique ID: 74afcec9f721062fad88abcbd08f2207b6d403f11acbe02606ad655071efa1b7 Item Level: 83 LevelReq: 65 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Your Chilling Towers freeze enemies for 0.2 seconds while they are affected by chilling beams Minions have +15% to all Elemental Resistances {fractured}Minions have 15% increased Attack and Cast Speed 72% increased Mana Regeneration Rate Minions deal 39% increased Damage {crafted}Can have up to 3 Crafted Modifiers {crafted}+26 to maximum Energy Shield {crafted}Non-Channelling Skills have -7 to Total Mana Cost

Rarity: UNIQUE Maata's Teaching Karui Sceptre Unique ID: e7da962b90fd14d3195b20dabeba291dc493c6b8e72f9eefa768bbf338da583f Item Level: 77 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-B-B LevelReq: 56 Implicits: 3 {crafted}Quality does not increase Physical Damage {crafted}1% increased Critical Strike Chance per 4% Quality 26% increased Elemental Damage +39 to Intelligence 27% increased Critical Strike Chance +1 to Level of all Minion Skill Gems Minions' Base Attack Critical Strike Chance is equal to the Critical Strike Chance of your Main Hand Weapon

Rarity: UNIQUE Clayshaper Rock Breaker Unique ID: 01ecf333a2307cd7a5ffa409bc6fbda55e9adcb0bf0e687afe592e95fa739e14 Item Level: 75 Quality: 0 Sockets: R-G-R LevelReq: 41 Implicits: 1 15% reduced Enemy Stun Threshold Grants Level 12 Summon Stone Golem Skill Adds 29 to 38 Physical Damage 8% increased Attack Speed +1 to maximum number of Summoned Golems Golems have 120 to 160 Added Attack Physical Damage

Input.name: customMods
Input.string: -- Aura from Merc and You and nearby allies gain 50% increased damage You and nearby allies gain 50% increased damage Nearby allies' damage with hits is lucky You and nearby allies gain 18% increased damage Nearby allies have culling strike Nearby allies have +50% to critical strike multiplier -- Envy Minions deal 101 to 141 additional chaos damage
